tagline: Proven and sustainable technology for water treatment

hero.headline:
Cleaner Water, Fewer
Chemicals
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves better than harsh chemicals. Creative Water Solutions' patented sphagnum moss technology naturally conditions your water -- reducing chemical use by up to 50% while keeping it crystal clear. Just nature, working the way it should.

services.label: Our Solutions
services.headline: Nature-Powered Water Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Application
services.subtitle: From backyard pools to industrial cooling towers, our patented sphagnum moss technology delivers cleaner water with fewer chemicals across every scale.

cards.title: Residential Pool Treatment
cards.description: PoolMoss and PoolStart Kits use natural sphagnum moss to reduce chemical usage in your pool. Simple monthly moss changes keep water balanced with less work and fewer chemicals.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Treatment
cards.description: SpaMoss and SpaStart Kits naturally condition your hot tub water, reduce maintenance, and minimize chemical exposure for a healthier, more comfortable soaking experience.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Systems
cards.description: PoolMoss Pro for commercial pools, waterparks, fountains, and ponds. Improve water and air quality, cut chemical costs, and deliver a better experience for swimmers.

cards.title: Industrial Water Treatment
cards.description: ProMoss systems for cooling towers, boilers, and wastewater. Naturally removes organic contamination while reducing corrosion, scaling, and extending equipment lifespan.

cards.title: Water Feature Treatment
cards.description: Natural moss-based solutions for fountains, ponds, and decorative water features that maintain clarity and balance without heavy chemical use or constant maintenance.

cards.title: Contact Chamber Systems
cards.description: Engineered delivery systems including submersible cages and offline chambers that create optimal moss-water contact for maximum treatment efficiency in any application.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Naturally Better Water

steps.title: Choose Your Solution
steps.description: Tell us about your pool, spa, or facility. We'll match you with the right moss-based product -- PoolMoss, SpaMoss, or ProMoss -- sized for your specific application.

steps.title: Simply Add Moss
steps.description: Place the moss product in your skimmer basket, filter, or contact chamber. Our patented sphagnum moss begins conditioning your water immediately -- no special tools needed.

steps.title: Enjoy Cleaner Water
steps.description: Experience noticeably softer, clearer water with fewer chemicals. Replace the moss monthly and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with nature-powered water treatment.

about.label: Why Choose Natural Water Care
about.headline: 23 Years of Pioneering Sustainable Water Treatment
about.description: Founded in 2003 in Plymouth, Minnesota, Creative Water Solutions developed the world's first patented sphagnum moss water treatment technology. Our products replicate the natural filtration found in pristine bog ecosystems, delivering cleaner water with dramatically fewer chemicals. From residential pools to industrial facilities like 3M and Corning, our science-backed approach proves that nature knows best.

features.title: Patented Moss Technology
features.description: Our proprietary sphagnum moss treatment is backed by patents and NSF International certification -- proven science, not guesswork.

features.title: Reduces Chemicals Up to 50%
features.description: Less chlorine, fewer algaecides, and dramatically lower chemical costs. Better for your skin, your equipment, and the environment.

features.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
features.description: Major corporations including 3M and Corning rely on our ProMoss technology for their industrial water treatment needs.

pricing.headline: Simple Products. Honest Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the natural water treatment solution that fits your needs. Easy to use, easy to maintain, easy on your wallet.

guarantee.headline: Our "Naturally Better" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you don't notice a visible difference in your water quality within 30 days of using our moss products, contact us and we'll work with you to make it right. We've spent 23 years perfecting this technology because we believe everyone deserves cleaner, healthier water -- naturally.

faqs.question: How does sphagnum moss treat pool water?
faqs.answer: Sphagnum moss naturally inhibits the growth of bacteria and algae through its unique biochemistry. Our patented technology replicates the pristine filtration found in bog ecosystems, conditioning your water while reducing the need for harsh chemicals by up to 50%.

faqs.question: How often do I need to replace the moss?
faqs.answer: For residential pools and spas, we recommend monthly moss changes. Simply remove the used moss from your skimmer or filter basket and drop in a fresh one. It takes less than 60 seconds and keeps your water naturally balanced.

faqs.question: Is this safe for swimmers and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our products are NSF International Certified (Standard 050) for pool equipment. The moss is 100% natural and actually reduces your exposure to harsh chemicals, making swimming healthier and more comfortable for everyone.

faqs.question: Can I use PoolMoss with my existing pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes! PoolMoss works with all standard pool filtration systems -- sand, cartridge, or DE filters. Simply place the moss product in your skimmer basket or install our contact chamber. No modifications to your existing equipment needed.

faqs.question: Do you offer solutions for commercial or industrial use?
faqs.answer: We do. Our PoolMoss Pro handles commercial pools, waterparks, and fountains, while ProMoss serves cooling towers, boilers, and industrial systems. Major clients like 3M and Corning trust our technology. Contact us for a custom consultation.

testimonials.name: Lauri O.
testimonials.text: Used for years as water treatment for home and hot tub. Love it! The water feels softer and we use so much less chlorine now. Would never go back to the old way.

testimonials.name: Donna S.
testimonials.text: I have been swimming in a pool that uses this system for many years now. They told me it uses moss to filter the water. I love this system! It makes swimming an exercise that is better for you.

testimonials.name: Gary G.
testimonials.text: Promoting Moss has expanded our client base, brought in new pool service customers, and has positively affected our bottom line. It's a genuine differentiator in our market.
